provides.name: semantic-retrieval-adapter search
provides.summary: Explicit opt-in Gemini embedding provider for citation-bearing OpenClerk semantic_search with retry/backoff.

provides.name: gemini-embeddings
provides.summary: Optional module skill for installed Gemini semantic retrieval.

artifacts.cache: rebuildable user-cache artifact outside committed repo

steps: Install semantic-retrieval-adapter separately from OpenClerk core.
Install modules/gemini-embeddings/skill/gemini-embeddings/SKILL.md only when the host opts into the Gemini module skill.
Store GEMINI_API_KEY in runtime_config for the target database before use.
Register the module with openclerk module install_module and this manifest.
Configure gemini_api_base, embedding_model, and embedding_output_dimensions through openclerk module configure_module.
install.uninstall: Run openclerk module remove_module for provider gemini, then remove the adapter binary, optional skill, and user-cache directory without changing OpenClerk core. Removing the provider module does not delete runtime_config:GEMINI_API_KEY.

compatibility.openclerk_runner: routes explicit retrieval semantic_search provider gemini through verified module registration
compatibility.search_default: does not replace openclerk retrieval search or promote default semantic ranking
compatibility.schema: returns the shared openclerk_semantic_retrieval.v1 contract with citations
